/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-gcc  -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -nostdlib -fno-pic -fno-pie -fno-stack-protector -mcmodel=large -mno-red-zone -mno-mmx -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -mgeneral-regs-only -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -include stdint.h -include stddef.h -include stdbool.h -nostdlib CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/userspace/init/src/vxair_init.c.obj CMakeFiles/init.elf.dir/userspace/crt/src/vxair_crt0.c.obj -o bin/init.elf  lib/libvxair_libc.a
